description: Fraud events: GeoIP enrichment, timestamp normalisation, field promotion. Threat intel enrichment added after sync-ip-feeds.sh runs.

script.source: if (ctx.attributes != null) { if (ctx.attributes.amount != null) ctx.amount = ctx.attributes.amount; if (ctx.attributes.merchant != null) ctx.merchant = ctx.attributes.merchant; if (ctx.attributes.category != null) ctx.category = ctx.attributes.category; }
